name: OT/ICS Security Standards MCP Server
what_it_does: MCP server from Ansvar Systems for Operational Technology (OT) and Industrial Control Systems (ICS) security standards. Provides AI agents reference access to IEC 62443, NIST SP 800-82, NIST SP 800-53, and MITRE ATT&CK for ICS frameworks. Enables security agents to query OT security standards for compliance, risk assessment, and threat modeling in industrial environments.
use_cases: Querying IEC 62443 requirements for OT security compliance agents
Researching NIST 800-82 guidelines for industrial network security from assessment agents
Looking up MITRE ATT&CK for ICS techniques from OT threat modeling agents
OT security gap analysis against multiple standards frameworks from compliance agents
not_for: IT security standards (OT/ICS-specific focus — use IT security MCPs for IT environments)
Legal or regulatory compliance authority — reference tool requiring expert validation
best_when: An OT security engineer or compliance agent working with industrial control systems needs to query IEC 62443, NIST 800-82, or MITRE ATT&CK for ICS frameworks during security assessments or compliance programs.
avoid_when: You work with pure IT environments. OT security standards (IEC 62443) are specifically for industrial control systems, SCADA, and operational technology — not enterprise IT.

auth.notes: No authentication required — references publicly available standards.

pricing.notes: Free open source from Ansvar Systems.

known_agent_gotchas: AUTHORIZED USE ONLY: OT security information — ensure this is used in legitimate security professional contexts
IEC 62443 is a paid standard — this server provides guidance/summaries, not full standard text
OT environments have unique safety implications — security changes in operational contexts require safety review
MITRE ATT&CK for ICS is specifically for adversarial technique research — use only in authorized assessment contexts
agent_readiness.security_notes: AUTHORIZED USE ONLY: OT/ICS security content in wrong hands could inform attacks on industrial systems. Use only in authorized security assessment and compliance contexts. Ansvar Systems specializes in industrial security compliance.

security_score_components.security_notes: OT security standards reference. Authorized use only. No auth but context-sensitive. Industrial safety implications.
